title: Pale Garden Panorama with Shaders
description: Changes the main menu panorama to a Pale Garden with Complementary Reimagined Shaders
body:
This resource pack changes the main menu panorama to a Pale Garden with Complementary Reimagined shaders :)

This pack is designed for 1.21.4 but it should work in other versions as well.




I used Complementary Reimagined Shaders in order to make this panorama, you can download them here: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined

Thanks so much to EminGT for making this amazing shader :D


Links:

[Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) (The shader used in the panorama)

[This pack on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pale-garden-panorama-with-shaders/)

[Bedrock version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pale-garden-panorama-with-shaders-bedrock/) (Planet Minecraft)
